info.title: Maintenance Service
info.description:
Maintenance management: work orders, preventive plans, meters, calibration, downtime tracking, and labor management.

**Authentication:** Bearer JWT. Tenant derived from JWT claims.
Permissions: MAINTENANCE_READ for queries, MAINTENANCE_MUTATE for writes.

get.summary: GET /api/health — liveness probe (legacy, kept for compatibility)
GET /api/version — module identity and schema version

ApiError.description:
Standard API error envelope.

`error` is a machine-readable code (`not_found`, `validation_error`, etc.).
`message` is human-readable.  `request_id` is populated from the tracing
context already present in request extensions.  `details` carries per-field
errors for 422 responses.

AssetType.description:
Asset type — classifies what kind of thing is being maintained.
Asset-type agnostic: this is for filtering/reporting, not behavior.

PaginatedResponse_Asset.description:
Generic paginated response envelope.

Every list endpoint returns this wrapper so consumers get consistent
pagination metadata regardless of the underlying entity type.

Priority.description: Priority level for work orders and maintenance plans.

WoStatus.description: Work order status — tracks lifecycle position within the state machine.

WoType.description: Work order type — classifies the nature of the maintenance work.
